_note: The full antediluvian wife-web from the Book of Jubilees ch.4. The Genesis-5 patriarchs married first their sisters (Enosh->Noam, Kenan->Mualeleth) then their first cousins (daughter of the father's brother). Each cousin-wife (named on the spine in 07_biblical) is here given her father, who is a BROTHER of the previous patriarch (an 'uncle' branch): Barakil (Mahalalel's uncle), Rasujal (Jared's), Danel (Enoch's), Azrial (Methuselah's), Barakiel (Lamech's), Rakeel (Noah's). Sisters Noam & Mualeleth become daughters of Seth & Enosh. Sorts after 07_biblical so all the wives already exist. Order: each uncle is created before he is used as a parent.

children.label:
Barakil
c.3700 BC · son of Enosh, brother of Kenan; Mahalalel's uncle · Jubilees 4:15

Rasujal
c.3640 BC · son of Kenan, brother of Mahalalel; Jared's uncle · Jubilees 4:16

Danel (Daniel)
c.3540 BC · son of Mahalalel, brother of Jared; Enoch's uncle & father-in-law · Jubilees 4:20

Azrial
c.3400 BC · son of Jared, brother of Enoch; Methuselah's uncle · Jubilees 4:27

Barakiel
c.3320 BC · son of Enoch, brother of Methuselah; Lamech's uncle · Jubilees 4:28

Rakeel
c.3180 BC · son of Methuselah, brother of Lamech; Noah's uncle · Jubilees 4:33
